title: DIU seeking ‘near-term’ power-beaming satellite demo
summary: The Defense Innovation Unit (DIU) is soliciting industry proposals for a 'near-term' demonstration of space-based power beaming. The project aims to achieve operational capability for space-to-space and space-to-ground power beaming by 2030. This initiative seeks to develop innovative methods for energy transfer in space and to terrestrial targets.

title: Saronic Selects Texas to Build $3 Billion ‘Port Alpha’ Shipyard for Autonomous Vessels
summary: Saronic has officially announced Brownsville, Texas, as the site for its $3 billion 'Port Alpha' shipyard, designed for next-generation autonomous vessels. This facility aims to significantly expand U.S. shipbuilding capacity and restore American maritime strength. The project represents a major milestone in Saronic's mission to scale up autonomous vessel production.

title: China Is Building A Monster Supply Ship For Its Carrier Groups
summary: China is reportedly constructing what appears to be the largest at-sea replenishment ship globally, intended to support its carrier groups. This massive supply vessel is taking shape at a Chinese shipyard. Its development indicates a significant enhancement of China's blue-water naval logistics and power projection capabilities.

title: New ‘Golden Defender’ missile monitor ship to be built at Hanwha Philly shipyard
summary: A new missile monitor ship, named 'Golden Defender', is slated for construction at the Hanwha Philly Shipyard. This vessel will support the 'Golden Dome' effort, likely related to missile defense. It will be based on the National Security Multi-Mission Vessels (NSMV) design currently built by Hanwha Philly Shipyard for the U.S. Maritime Administration.

title: EU, Ukraine sign drone deal to fast-track unmanned systems production
summary: The European Union and Ukraine have signed a drone deal aimed at accelerating the production of unmanned systems. Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskyy stated that Ukraine currently produces 10 million drones annually and envisions increasing this to 20 million with partner assistance. This agreement underscores efforts to boost Ukraine's defense capabilities through increased drone manufacturing.

summary: If every meeting, watercooler conversation, and date gets transcribed and summarized, who's actually reading any of it?

title: Tiny drone hits invisible mode by twisting faster than eye can detect
summary: Engineers at Northwestern University have built a drone that vanishes without camouflage or transparent panels. Its trick is spinning so fast that your eyes simply give up trying to focus, a stealth edge that could turn surveillance into something almost invisible. title: Crypto exchange Bybit launches in Indonesia after NOBI acquisition
summary: The launch gives Bybit a locally operated platform in one of Asia’s largest crypto markets, home to more than 21 million crypto exchange users.

title: Bitcoin Q-Day Recovery Proposal Aims to Let Users Prove Ownership After Quantum Attack
summary: Project Eleven says a new post-quantum cryptographic proof could help Bitcoin users recover wallets after Q-Day by verifying ownership.
